steps.title: Identify the context
steps.content: The passage claims “Day by day, Dot grew stronger”—the underlined sentence immediately follows this general statement.

steps.title: Match the detail to the function
steps.content: C correctly identifies the sentence's function: it offers a concrete detail that demonstrates Dot's physical growth through her exercising in the stroller to develop leg muscles. The other choices incorrectly attribute the sentence to Celestine's development, the narrator's psychology, or Celestine's sadness. That matches choice C — C is correct.
